ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic of the article */,
  "submit_date" TEXT /* Date the article was submitted */,
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who submitted the article */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the article (e.g., submitted, under review, accepted, rejected) */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Decision made on the article (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the decision */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the article */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the article */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Brief summary of the article */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for better searchability */,
  "file_url" TEXT /* URL to the uploaded file of the article */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the article details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_submitter_id FOREIGN KEY ("submitter_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent topic for hierarchical structures */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the topic for better categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_parent_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* Link to the researcher's profile */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for researchers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the reviewer belongs to */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the reviewer */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews completed by the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the reviewer */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation made by the reviewer (e.g., accept, reject, revise) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Reviewer's confidence in their recommendation */,
  "review_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of review rounds for the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_reviews_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article that was published */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the article was published */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of the journal */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue of the journal */,
  "page_number" INTEGER /* Page number of the article in the journal */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the article */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations the article has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles_topics" (
  "article_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article-topic relationship */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the topic to the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_topics_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_topics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, reviewer, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
